allow:
Bash(python -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy import text
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine
from app.core.config import settings

async def check_constraints\(\):
    engine = create_async_engine\(settings.SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI\)
    async with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
        # Check all tables
        result = await conn.execute\(text\(''''''
            SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables 
            WHERE table_schema = ''public'' AND table_type = ''BASE TABLE''
            ORDER BY table_name
        ''''''\)\)
        tables = [row[0] for row in result.fetchall\(\)]
        print\(''Tables:'', tables\)
        
        # Check if sharedmeasure exists
        if ''sharedmeasure'' in tables:
            print\(''\\nsharedmeasure constraints:''\)
            result = await conn.execute\(text\(''''''
                SELECT conname FROM pg_constraint 
                WHERE conrelid = ''sharedmeasure''::regclass
            ''''''\)\)
            for row in result.fetchall\(\):
                print\(f''  - {row[0]}''\)
        
        if ''measuretemplate'' in tables:
            print\(''\\nmeasuretemplate exists - needs migration''\)
        if ''measure'' in tables:
            print\(''\\nmeasure exists - needs migration''\)
        if ''control'' in tables:
            print\(''\\ncontrol already exists - migration may have partially run''\)
            
    await engine.dispose\(\)

asyncio.run\(check_constraints\(\)\)
")
